description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-story apartment building with a red brick facade on the front and one side, and gray stonework on the other two sides. The front features a prominent entrance with a staircase, black metal railings, and bay windows that add architectural interest. The rear of the building has two levels of covered balconies with blue railings, providing outdoor space for residents. Windows are symmetrically arranged across all sides, with the front and rear showing more decorative detailing. The roof is flat and dark, with visible utility elements such as a vent or HVAC unit. The building's overall appearance suggests a late 19th or early 20th-century urban architectural style, commonly found in dense city neighborhoods.
description: A multi-story red brick and stone apartment building with bay windows, a front staircase, and rear balconies. The structure features symmetrical window arrangements and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with stairs, bay windows, and decorative brickwork.
description_view_1: Side view with plain gray stonework, evenly spaced windows, and no balconies or entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two levels of covered balconies with blue railings and a stone facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with red brick, symmetrical window placement, and a glimpse of the rear balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on all sides, with consistent spacing and alignment. The front features bay windows, while the other sides have flat, evenly spaced windows.
